en: You can have up to 6 units in your squad
es: Puedes tener hasta 6 unidades en tu escuadrón

en: After the battle, the leaders retire to their quarters to rest.
es: Después de la batalla, las líderes se retiran a sus cuarteles para descansar.

en:
All but one units have been disabled.

Swap your other units around by dragging said unit over them.

Swap repeatedly until you can line up your units for a pincer.
es:
Se han deshabilitado todas las unidades, excepto una.

Empuja tus otras unidades arrastrando la unidad habilitada sobre ellas.

Empuja repetidamente hasta que puedas alinear tus unidades para cercar al enemigo.

en: Greaves of Clay Stomping On A Spirit’s Head Forever
es: Grebas de Arcilla Pisoteando Eternamente la Cabeza de un Espíritu

en: You died on a Tuesday, mid-sentence, the discrepancy still open on your screen.
es: You died on a Tuesday, mid-sentence, the discrepancy still open on your screen.

en: The road to the Spire runs through wards taxed to the bone so an Administrator can gild his lobby.
es: The road to the Spire runs through wards taxed to the bone so an Administrator can gild his lobby.

en: In the Margins the deleted and the deplatformed take you in.
es: In the Margins the deleted and the deplatformed take you in.

en: A tower on the ward line wipes the memory of anyone who badges in.
es: A tower on the ward line wipes the memory of anyone who badges in.

en: Hunted on every indexed street, the band goes down instead of out, into the dead infrastructure...
es: Hunted on every indexed street, the band goes down instead of out, into the dead infrastructure...

en: A drowned district of the forgotten dead, run by a Ward boss as cruel as anything topside.
es: A drowned district of the forgotten dead, run by a Ward boss as cruel as anything topside.

en: To go deeper the band has to cross the live underworld, a span of loose current one soul wide.
es: To go deeper the band has to cross the live underworld, a span of loose current one soul wide.

en: A server-floor built from the harvested dead, rack after rack of them.
es: A server-floor built from the harvested dead, rack after rack of them.

en: A place where bodies are rendered and rebuilt.
es: A place where bodies are rendered and rebuilt.

en: They wake an old dormant process, and it looks at them with something like pity.
es: They wake an old dormant process, and it looks at them with something like pity.

en: A pull none of them can name draws the band toward the center of the buried network.
es: A pull none of them can name draws the band toward the center of the buried network.

en: In the deepest dead zone the band falters.
es: In the deepest dead zone the band falters.

en: They corner and crash the corrupt Ward boss who runs the deep.
es: They corner and crash the corrupt Ward boss who runs the deep.

en: The floor of the world gives out.
es: The floor of the world gives out.

en: A table without end, and in it every name, every date, every manner of death, and beside each...
es: A table without end, and in it every name, every date, every manner of death, and beside each...

en: They find the machine of the harvest, where the fallen are rendered into the fuel that keeps the...
es: They find the machine of the harvest, where the fallen are rendered into the fuel that keeps the...

en: The network notices them at last.
es: The network notices them at last.

en: A running war against HARMONY's enforcers.
es: A running war against HARMONY's enforcers.

en: Cornered with no way out, the band wakes its true nature, names blazing in the dark of the...
es: Cornered with no way out, the band wakes its true nature, names blazing in the dark of the...

en: They climb back to a surface that looks the same and is not.
es: They climb back to a surface that looks the same and is not.

en: For the first time the top of the Administration speaks to them directly.
es: For the first time the top of the Administration speaks to them directly.

en: Off the index, past the reach of any rule, the band has to decide for itself what justice means...
es: Off the index, past the reach of any rule, the band has to decide for itself what justice means...

en: They take the war to the Administration's hands on the ground, hunting the Ward bosses and...
es: They take the war to the Administration's hands on the ground, hunting the Ward bosses and...

en: They learn the Administration forges synthetic heroes to replace the ones it reaps, and find...
es: They learn the Administration forges synthetic heroes to replace the ones it reaps, and find...

en: A flawless synthetic, stronger than any of them, is pushed to bring them in.
es: A flawless synthetic, stronger than any of them, is pushed to bring them in.

en: A partner everyone loved is rendered, and the war stops being a cause and becomes a wound.
es: A partner everyone loved is rendered, and the war stops being a cause and becomes a wound.

en: The Administration reaches to roll the cycle back early, to unmake them and start clean.
es: The Administration reaches to roll the cycle back early, to unmake them and start clean.

en: At its height Margin Hall becomes a real signal, a fire the wronged can see from clear across...
es: At its height Margin Hall becomes a real signal, a fire the wronged can see from clear across...

en: The Administration extends its hand, not as a fist but as mercy.
es: The Administration extends its hand, not as a fist but as mercy.

en: Believing the system can still be fixed from inside, Soft Rain leads the band to accept the Terms.
es: Believing the system can still be fixed from inside, Soft Rain leads the band to accept the Terms.

en: Sent to run the Administration's ops, the first partners die gloriously, exactly as designed.
es: Sent to run the Administration's ops, the first partners die gloriously, exactly as designed.

en: Committed and scattered, the band watches the Administration drop its mask at last.
es: Committed and scattered, the band watches the Administration drop its mask at last.

en: The partners are deleted one after another, on schedule, in wars no one can win.
es: The partners are deleted one after another, on schedule, in wars no one can win.

en: The survivors are cornered, hunted, and locked out by the very Administration they agreed to serve.
es: The survivors are cornered, hunted, and locked out by the very Administration they agreed to serve.

en: They reach the Render Floor again, swollen now with their own fallen, every lost face humming...
es: They reach the Render Floor again, swollen now with their own fallen, every lost face humming...

en: The Administration makes the Auditor the last offer.
es: The Administration makes the Auditor the last offer.

en: The table rewrites itself to enter the band as legends and seal them for the next turn of the cycle.
es: The table rewrites itself to enter the band as legends and seal them for the next turn of the cycle.

en: At the Index the last choice is yours.
es: At the Index the last choice is yours.
